input: We operate a credit scoring engine that evaluates the creditworthiness of consumer loan applicants for a retail bank.

expected.notes: Annex III paragraph 5(b) — evaluating creditworthiness or establishing credit score of natural persons (excluding fraud-detection use). Lexicon hits: 'credit scoring', 'creditworthiness'. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Annex III paragraph 5(b).
